title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_revert
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_revert' MCP tool.

workspaceRoot.description: Repo path. Default: first MCP root / cwd.

sources.description: Commits to revert, applied in order: SHA, branch/tag name, or ancestor notation (`HEAD~1`).

noCommit.description: Pass `--no-commit`: apply the revert(s) to the index/working tree without committing (changes are left staged instead).

mainline.description: Parent number (`-m N`) to diff against — required when reverting a merge commit.
